projects.name: Solar + Energy Storage on Garage
projects.description: Install 5-7 solar panels on south-facing garage roof face (20x12 ft, ~2-2.8 kW) plus battery storage. Solar = standalone ROI investment (~5yr payback at $0.42/kWh). Battery = generator alternative (no lot space for generator). 30% federal ITC applies to both when paired.
projects.notes: DESIGN: South garage face only. 5 portrait panels = 2.0 kW; 7 mixed = 2.8 kW. ~3,200-4,500 kWh/yr production (20-26% offset). All-in after ITC: solar ~$9-10k, battery ~$9-10k. VENDORS: Sunergy (sunergy.com) — EnergySage 2026 CA Installer of Year, Enphase Platinum, no door-to-door. NRG Clean Power (nrgcleanpower.com) — Diamond Certified, 35yr, San Mateo County, 40yr warranty. Tesla Energy (tesla.com/energy) — online only. AVOID: Sunrun.

tasks.title: Analyze energy usage and size system
tasks.notes: 17,178 kWh/yr at $0.42/kWh avg. Target: 5-7 panels south garage face (20x12 ft) = 2-2.8 kW. ~5yr payback after ITC.

tasks.title: Research and shortlist solar installers
tasks.notes: Shortlist: Sunergy (sunergy.com, Enphase Platinum, no door-to-door), NRG Clean Power (nrgcleanpower.com, Diamond Certified, San Mateo County), Tesla Energy (tesla.com/energy, online only). Avoid Sunrun.

tasks.title: Contact installers for quotes
tasks.notes: Spec: south garage face (20x12 ft, 5-7 panels, ~2-2.8 kW), paired battery (Enphase IQ or Powerwall 3), detached garage sub-panel interconnect. Ask each for: $/W, panel brand, inverter type, battery spec, warranty, timeline, ITC total. Request free shade/LIDAR analysis.

tasks.title: Compare quotes and select installer
tasks.notes: Prefer Enphase microinverters over string inverter. Compare $/W, battery spec, warranty, timeline. 30% ITC on full system incl. battery.

tasks.title: Confirm ITC timing — credit files in year PTO is granted
tasks.notes: 30% federal ITC on Form 5695. Claimed in tax year Permission to Operate granted by PG&E. Battery qualifies only when solar-paired. Plan install timing accordingly.

insights.summary: Roxanne’s sleep tracker reports a 10.66-hour session ending at 23:32, which is highly unusual for a Thursday evening and likely indicates a tracking artifact, a prolonged nap, or early fatigue/illness worth monitoring.

A sudden surge to 20 connected devices at 21:27 followed by a gradual decline, paired with zero camera motion over the last four hours, indicates a group of guests or friends gathered in a camera-blind zone before dispersing. This cross-signal pattern explains the high device count without corresponding visual activity and suggests normal evening socializing.
High-activity pattern: living_room averaging 20 camera observations/day over the last 7 days.

The rapid decline in connected devices (19 to 13 in 13 minutes) combined with zero camera motion indicates the household is actively leaving the Wi-Fi range or powering down devices, suggesting a likely evening departure or transition to a quiet, unmonitored routine.
High-activity pattern: living_room averaging 26 camera observations/day over the last 7 days.

The sustained presence of 14–17 devices combined with zero camera motion for four hours strongly suggests either a camera system connectivity failure or the household congregated in a blind spot; a quick system check is recommended to rule out hardware issues.

The persistent presence of 11–15 devices paired with zero camera motion over the last four hours strongly suggests a camera system issue (offline, disabled, or motion detection failure) rather than normal household activity, warranting a quick system check.
High-activity pattern: backyard averaging 22 camera observations/day over the last 7 days.
High-activity pattern: living_room averaging 30 camera observations/day over the last 7 days.

The sustained presence of 11–14 connected devices during typical daytime hours, paired with zero camera activity, strongly indicates the camera system may be offline, malfunctioning, or intentionally disabled while the home remains active. This creates an unmonitored blind spot during a period when the family and pets are likely present.
